issues.title: [INTEGRATION] Implement the Health Assistant adapter
issues.body:
## Outcome

Implement a gateway adapter against the reviewed public application-service contract from `Dyu20705/health-assistant`.

## Scope

- Capability discovery and version checks.
- Typed request/result translation.
- Timeout, cancellation, health, and stable error mapping.
- No private-module imports, database access, or human CLI parsing.

## Dependencies

- CA-AI-003
- CA-AI-007
- CA-AI-008
- Public contract in `Dyu20705/health-assistant`.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Contract fixtures pass in both producer and gateway repositories.
- [ ] Unavailable or incompatible assistants degrade independently.
- [ ] Domain safety refusals and validation errors preserve their meaning.
- [ ] The adapter contains orchestration only, not domain prompts or policy.

issues.title: [INTEGRATION] Publish the stable consumer API for Mama Tổng Quản
match_titles: [INTEGRATION] Publish the my-discord-bot consumer gateway API
issues.body:
## Outcome

Expose the authenticated local HTTP/JSON API consumed only by `my-discord-bot` in the MVP.

## Scope

- Health/readiness, capability discovery, request submission, result, progress, and cancellation.
- Request size, connection, timeout, replay, and authentication controls.
- OpenAPI or equivalent machine-readable contract.

## Dependencies

- CA-AI-002
- CA-AI-003
- CA-AI-004
- CA-AI-007

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] The API binds only to loopback or a private network by default.
- [ ] Raw Discord objects and tokens are rejected.
- [ ] Compatibility and error fixtures are published.
- [ ] Mutation semantics and retryability are explicit.

issues.title: [SECURITY] Implement safe content and temporary attachment staging
match_titles: [SECURITY] Implement safe request content and attachment staging
issues.body:
## Outcome

Handle bounded request content and opaque temporary file references without exposing arbitrary filesystem access.

## Scope

- Allowlisted content types and sizes after Discord-side validation.
- Per-request staging, hashes, expiry, cleanup, and path traversal prevention.
- Specialist-specific acceptance occurs after gateway validation.

## Dependencies

- CA-AI-003
- CA-AI-004
- CA-AI-008
- CA-AI-014

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Callers cannot select arbitrary paths or commands.
- [ ] Temporary data is deleted on success, rejection, timeout, cancellation, and crash recovery.
- [ ] Health attachments remain disabled until separately approved.
- [ ] Tests cover malformed, oversized, duplicate, expired, and malicious references.

issues.title: [IMPLEMENTATION] Add structured results and delivery metadata
match_titles: [FEATURE] Implement structured result and delivery metadata
issues.body:
## Outcome

Return transport-neutral content and presentation hints that Mama can safely render in Discord.

## Scope

- Short text, paginated text, structured sections, progress, warnings, citations/provenance, and optional file-backed output.
- Explicit privacy and urgency metadata for health results.
- No Discord embeds or interaction objects.

## Dependencies

- CA-AI-003
- CA-AI-014

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Every result form has limits and validation.
- [ ] Unsafe or incompatible presentation hints are rejected.
- [ ] Emergency health content is mandatory and non-optional.
- [ ] The bot can render results without interpreting specialist database schemas.

issues.title: [TEST] Add protocol, router, adapter, and cross-repository compatibility tests
match_titles: [TEST] Add CI, unit-test foundation, and contract fixtures
[TEST] Add cross-repository contract and compatibility tests
issues.body:
## Outcome

Create an offline quality gate that detects contract drift across all five AI repositories.

## Scope

- Protocol schema and golden fixtures.
- HTTP consumer/provider tests.
- Generic, language, game, and health adapter fakes.
- Version-window and deprecation matrix.
- Concurrency, cancellation, cleanup, and error translation.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Default CI needs no Discord, Ollama, or real user data.
- [ ] Producer and consumer fixtures agree.
- [ ] Malformed and future-version payloads fail predictably.
- [ ] Health safety errors cannot be downgraded to generic internal errors.

issues.title: [QA] Run load, failure-injection, privacy, and safety evaluation
issues.body:
## Outcome

Validate the release candidate under realistic local CPU constraints and dependency failures.

## Scope

- Concurrent generic/specialist requests, queue saturation, slow Ollama, adapter crash, malformed responses, cancellation, and restart.
- Content-free log inspection and attachment cleanup.
- Health fail-closed and urgent/emergency scenarios using synthetic fixtures.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Resource use stays within documented laptop limits.
- [ ] No request crosses user or capability boundaries.
- [ ] No raw private content or secrets appear in logs.
- [ ] Failure injection does not corrupt assistant-owned storage or block unrelated capabilities.
